mapper.select: SELECT notify_type AS notifyType, COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS sent, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failed FROM notify_record WHERE alarm_id = #{alarmId} GROUP BY notify_type ORDER BY notify_type

SELECT p.id, p.station_name, p.liaison, p.liaison_phone, p.duty_phone, p.address, NULL AS distance_km FROM police_station p WHERE p.deleted = 0 AND p.status = 1
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM school_info s WHERE s.deleted = 0 AND s.town_id = #{townId} AND s.police_station_id = p.id )
LIMIT 5

SELECT n.id, n.alarm_id, n.operator_id, n.operator_name, n.operator_role, n.note_content, n.attach_url, n.is_important, n.created_at FROM alarm_supplement_note n WHERE n.deleted = 0 AND n.alarm_id = #{alarmId} ORDER BY n.is_important DESC, n.created_at DESC
